tm_items.quote: After years of managing projects without a credential, Granite PM Academy gave me the structure and confidence to pass the PMP on my first try. The instructors spoke from genuine field experience, not just textbook knowledge.
tm_items.name: Marcus T.

tm_items.quote: I wasn’t sure I had the background to sit for the CAPM, but the course made everything approachable. Within three weeks of finishing the training, I passed the exam and landed a junior PM role at a local firm.
tm_items.name: Diana R.

tm_items.quote: I chose the on-demand PMP option because my schedule is unpredictable. The content was well-organized, the practice exams were thorough, and the instructor responded quickly whenever I had questions.
tm_items.name: Kevin L.

fq_items.question: What are the eligibility requirements for the PMP exam?
fq_items.answer: PMI requires a four-year degree with 36 months of project leadership experience, or a high school diploma with 60 months of experience. All applicants also need 35 hours of PM education, which our PMP Certification Training satisfies.

fq_items.question: How long does it take to get PMP certified?
fq_items.answer: After completing your training, PMI typically approves your application within 5–10 business days. Once approved, you have one year to schedule and pass the exam. Most candidates take 4–8 weeks to study after their course.

fq_items.question: What is the CAPM and who should pursue it?
fq_items.answer: The Certified Associate in Project Management is designed for professionals early in their PM career or transitioning into project management. It requires only secondary education and 23 hours of training — no professional experience is required.

fq_items.question: What is CPMAI and how does it differ from PMP?
fq_items.answer: The CPMAI credential, offered by Cognilytica, focuses on managing projects that involve artificial intelligence. It covers the AI project lifecycle, data strategy, and governance. It complements rather than replaces the PMP.

fq_items.question: Do your courses satisfy PMI’s education hour requirement?
fq_items.answer: Yes. Our PMP training provides the 35 contact hours required for the PMP exam application. Our CAPM training provides the 23 hours required for the CAPM application. You receive a certificate of completion to submit to PMI.

fq_items.question: Are the courses available entirely online?
fq_items.answer: Yes. All of our programs are offered as live-virtual cohorts conducted via video conference — no travel required. We also offer self-paced on-demand access for PMP and CAPM courses. Both formats include the same study materials and instructor support.

columns.title: Granite PM Academy
columns.text: Providing PMI-aligned project management certification training in {city_state}. PMP®, CAPM®, and CPMAI® programs taught by certified practitioners with real-world experience.

page_pmp_cert.title: PMP Certification Training San Antonio TX

content_blocks.hs_subtext: Granite PM Academy’s PMP Certification Training in {city_state} prepares you to pass the Project Management Professional exam and advance your career. Our four-day program satisfies PMI’s 35 education hour requirement and is taught by active, certified practitioners.

content_blocks.fs_subtext: Our curriculum is built around PMI’s current Examination Content Outline and covers all three project management domains — People, Process, and Business Environment — across predictive, agile, and hybrid approaches.

fs_items.heading: Project Leadership and Teams
fs_items.text: Stakeholder engagement, team development, conflict resolution, and servant leadership principles across project environments.

fs_items.heading: Planning and Execution
fs_items.text: Scope, schedule, budget, risk, quality, and procurement management across predictive and agile delivery frameworks.

fs_items.heading: Agile and Hybrid Methods
fs_items.text: Scrum, Kanban, and hybrid approaches as tested on the current PMP exam, including agile planning and iteration management.

fs_items.heading: Exam Strategy and Practice
fs_items.text: Full-length practice exams, question walkthroughs, and proven test-taking strategies to help you pass on the first attempt.

steps_items.heading: Verify Your Eligibility
steps_items.text: Confirm you meet PMI’s requirements: a degree plus 36 months of project leadership experience (or 60 months without a degree) and 35 hours of PM education.

steps_items.heading: Complete the Training
steps_items.text: Attend our four-day live-virtual course or work through the on-demand version at your own pace. Both satisfy PMI’s 35 contact hour requirement.

steps_items.heading: Submit Your PMI Application
steps_items.text: Use your certificate of completion and project experience documentation to complete the PMI exam application. Approval typically takes 5–10 business days.

steps_items.heading: Pass the PMP Exam
steps_items.text: Schedule and sit for the 180-question PMP exam at a Pearson VUE testing center or online. Our practice exams and coaching prepare you to succeed.

pc_items.name: Live-Virtual PMP Training
pc_items.desc: Join a live cohort led by an active PMP practitioner. Ask questions in real time, collaborate with peers, and follow a structured four-day program.
pc_items.features:
4 days of live instruction (8am–5pm)
Real-time Q&A with your instructor
35 contact hours for PMI application
Full exam prep and practice tests
Study materials included

pc_items.name: On-Demand PMP Training
pc_items.desc: Access the full PMP curriculum on your schedule. Study at the pace that works for you with recorded sessions, practice exams, and instructor support.
pc_items.features:
Lifetime access to course recordings
Self-paced — start any day
35 contact hours for PMI application
Full practice exam bank
Instructor email support

fq_items.question: How many education hours does your PMP course provide?
fq_items.answer: Our PMP Certification Training provides 35 contact hours, which is exactly what PMI requires for the PMP exam application. You will receive a certificate of completion documenting these hours.

fq_items.question: Is the PMP exam included in the course fee?
fq_items.answer: The exam fee is paid separately to PMI. PMI members pay $405 and non-members pay $555. We focus on making sure you are fully prepared to pass when you sit for the exam.

fq_items.question: How current is your curriculum?
fq_items.answer: Our curriculum is updated to reflect PMI’s current Examination Content Outline. The PMP exam now covers both predictive and agile methods — our training addresses both thoroughly.

fq_items.question: What pass rate do your students achieve?
fq_items.answer: Our students achieve a first-attempt pass rate of approximately 92%. We attribute this to our instructor experience, comprehensive practice exams, and the test-taking strategy coaching built into every session.

fq_items.question: Can I take the PMP exam online instead of at a test center?
fq_items.answer: Yes. PMI offers the PMP exam in an online proctored format. Our training prepares you for the exam regardless of whether you test at a Pearson VUE center or online from home.

fq_items.question: What if I need to reschedule or transfer my course?
fq_items.answer: Contact our team at least 7 days before your course start date and we will work with you on rescheduling. Please review our registration terms for full details on transfers and cancellations.

content_blocks.cf_heading: Questions About PMP Training? Ask Us.
content_blocks.cf_subtext: We’re happy to help you figure out which program and format is the right fit.

content_blocks.cb_subtext: Join a scheduled cohort or enroll in on-demand access today. Our team is here to help you choose the right path.

page_pmp_boot.title: PMP Exam Prep Bootcamp San Antonio

content_blocks.hs_subtext: Our intensive five-day PMP Bootcamp in {city_state} combines the full 35 education hours of PMP training with deep exam prep in one focused program. Ideal for experienced project managers who want to fast-track to exam day.

content_blocks.fs_subtext: The PMP Bootcamp is our most intensive preparation program. Over five days, you cover the full PMP curriculum and complete a focused exam readiness session, leaving you prepared to schedule your exam immediately after.

fs_items.heading: Complete PMP Curriculum
fs_items.text: Days 1–4 cover all PMI exam content domains: predictive, agile, and hybrid project management across People, Process, and Business Environment.

fs_items.heading: Dedicated Exam Prep Day
fs_items.text: Day 5 focuses exclusively on exam strategy, question analysis, and full-length practice exam review so you leave ready to schedule your test.

fs_items.heading: 35 Education Hours Satisfied
fs_items.text: The bootcamp satisfies PMI’s 35 contact hour requirement in full. Your certificate of completion is ready immediately after the program.

fs_items.heading: Small Group Format
fs_items.text: Bootcamp cohorts are kept deliberately small so instructors can address individual questions and tailor the pace to the group’s needs.

fq_items.question: Who is the PMP Bootcamp designed for?
fq_items.answer: The bootcamp is best suited for experienced project managers who already have a working knowledge of project management and want to complete both training and exam prep in a single, intensive program.

fq_items.question: How is the bootcamp different from the 4-day PMP training?
fq_items.answer: The bootcamp adds a fifth day dedicated entirely to exam readiness — full-length practice exams, question analysis, and test-taking strategy coaching. The 4-day PMP training includes exam prep integrated throughout but is less intensive.

fq_items.question: Does the bootcamp satisfy PMI’s education hour requirement?
fq_items.answer: Yes. The PMP Bootcamp provides 35 contact hours, satisfying PMI’s full education requirement for the PMP exam application.

fq_items.question: What days of the week is the bootcamp held?
fq_items.answer: Our bootcamp cohorts run Monday through Friday, 8:00am–6:00pm Central Time, via live video conference. See the schedule above for upcoming dates.

fq_items.question: Can I apply for my PMI exam the day after bootcamp?
fq_items.answer: Yes. You can submit your PMI application as soon as you have your certificate of completion in hand. Most candidates submit their application the same week they complete the bootcamp.

fq_items.question: What materials are included?
fq_items.answer: Bootcamp registration includes the full digital study guide, practice exam access, and any additional reference materials used during the program. All materials are accessible after the bootcamp ends.

content_blocks.cf_heading: Ready to Register or Have Questions?
content_blocks.cf_subtext: Our team can help you find the right fit.

content_blocks.cb_subtext: The PMP Bootcamp is our most efficient path to exam day. Five focused days and you’re ready to test.

page_capm_cert.title: CAPM Certification Training San Antonio TX

content_blocks.hs_subtext: Granite PM Academy’s CAPM Certification Training gives aspiring project managers in {city_state} the foundational knowledge and PMI education hours to earn the Certified Associate in Project Management credential. Our two-day program is instructor-led, practical, and exam-focused.

content_blocks.fs_subtext: Our CAPM program is aligned with PMI’s current CAPM Exam Content Outline and covers the core domains of project management — giving you the knowledge to speak confidently about PM principles, processes, and methodologies.

fs_items.heading: Project Management Fundamentals
fs_items.text: Core concepts including project lifecycle, stakeholder identification, and the relationship between projects, programs, and portfolios.

fs_items.heading: Predictive Project Approaches
fs_items.text: Initiating, planning, executing, monitoring, and closing a project using traditional plan-driven methods.

fs_items.heading: Agile and Hybrid Frameworks
fs_items.text: Introduction to Scrum, Kanban, and hybrid approaches as covered on the current CAPM exam.

fs_items.heading: Exam Prep and Practice
fs_items.text: CAPM practice questions, exam-style walkthroughs, and strategy coaching designed to help you pass on the first attempt.

steps_items.heading: Confirm Your Eligibility
steps_items.text: The CAPM requires a high school diploma or secondary education credential. No professional experience is required — just 23 hours of project management education.

steps_items.heading: Complete the Training
steps_items.text: Attend our two-day live-virtual CAPM course or complete the on-demand version at your own pace. Both satisfy PMI’s 23 contact hour requirement.

steps_items.heading: Submit Your PMI Application
steps_items.text: Use your certificate of completion to submit the CAPM application to PMI. Most applications are approved within 5–10 business days.

steps_items.heading: Pass the CAPM Exam
steps_items.text: Sit for the 150-question CAPM exam at a Pearson VUE location or online. Our practice exams and exam coaching prepare you thoroughly.

fq_items.question: Do I need work experience to apply for the CAPM?
fq_items.answer: No. Unlike the PMP, the CAPM does not require professional project management experience. You only need a secondary education (high school diploma or equivalent) and 23 hours of PM education.

fq_items.question: How many education hours does your CAPM course provide?
fq_items.answer: Our CAPM Certification Training provides 23 contact hours, satisfying PMI’s full education requirement. You will receive a certificate of completion to include in your PMI application.

fq_items.question: How long is the CAPM exam?
fq_items.answer: The CAPM exam consists of 150 questions and must be completed within three hours. Questions cover predictive, agile, and business analysis content areas.

fq_items.question: Is the CAPM worth pursuing if I plan to get the PMP later?
fq_items.answer: Yes. The CAPM builds the foundational knowledge that underpins the PMP and gives you a recognized PMI credential to show employers while you accumulate the project leadership experience needed for the PMP.

fq_items.question: Can I take the CAPM exam online?
fq_items.answer: Yes. PMI offers the CAPM in an online proctored format. Our training prepares you for the exam regardless of whether you test at a Pearson VUE center or from home.

fq_items.question: How soon after the training can I apply to PMI?
fq_items.answer: You can submit your PMI application as soon as you complete the course and receive your certificate of completion. Many students submit the same day they finish training.

content_blocks.cf_heading: Questions About CAPM Certification? Let’s Talk.
content_blocks.cf_subtext: We’re happy to help you determine if the CAPM is the right credential for where you are in your career.

content_blocks.cb_subtext: Two days of focused training and you’ll have everything you need to apply for the exam.

content_blocks.hs_subtext: The Certified Project Manager AI (CPMAI) credential from Cognilytica is designed for project managers leading artificial intelligence initiatives. Granite PM Academy’s CPMAI training in {city_state} prepares you to manage AI projects with structure, confidence, and recognized credentials.

content_blocks.fs_subtext: The CPMAI curriculum is built on Cognilytica’s CPMAI methodology — a framework for planning, executing, and governing artificial intelligence projects from business case through deployment.

fs_items.heading: AI Project Lifecycle
fs_items.text: The six-phase CPMAI lifecycle: Define, Collect, Build, Evaluate, Implement, and Monitor — applied to real AI initiatives.

fs_items.heading: Data Strategy and Governance
fs_items.text: How to plan for data sourcing, quality, labeling, and compliance as core components of any AI project plan.

fs_items.heading: AI Tool and Vendor Assessment
fs_items.text: Frameworks for evaluating AI platforms, build-vs-buy decisions, and managing relationships with AI technology vendors.

fs_items.heading: Risk and Ethics in AI Projects
fs_items.text: Managing algorithmic bias, explainability requirements, regulatory considerations, and stakeholder concerns in AI-driven work.

fq_items.question: What is the CPMAI credential?
fq_items.answer: The Certified Project Manager AI (CPMAI) is a credential offered by Cognilytica that recognizes professionals who are qualified to manage projects involving artificial intelligence. It focuses on the unique challenges of planning, executing, and governing AI initiatives.

fq_items.question: Do I need a PMP to pursue the CPMAI?
fq_items.answer: No. The CPMAI is a standalone credential. While project management experience is helpful, you do not need to hold the PMP or any other PMI certification to enroll in our CPMAI training or to pursue the CPMAI credential.

fq_items.question: What kind of professionals benefit most from CPMAI training?
fq_items.answer: Project managers, business analysts, product managers, and technology leaders who are overseeing or expect to work on AI-related projects. It’s also valuable for IT leaders responsible for AI tool selection and governance.

fq_items.question: Is CPMAI recognized by employers?
fq_items.answer: Awareness of the CPMAI is growing rapidly as organizations build out AI project portfolios. It demonstrates a specific and relevant skill set that distinguishes candidates in roles involving AI initiative management.

fq_items.question: How long is the CPMAI training?
fq_items.answer: Our CPMAI program is a two-day course offered in live-virtual cohort format. On-demand access is also available for those who prefer to work through the material at their own pace.

fq_items.question: Is there an exam after the training?
fq_items.answer: Yes. The CPMAI credential requires passing a Cognilytica examination. Our training prepares you for that exam and covers the content areas included in the Cognilytica CPMAI exam framework.

content_blocks.cf_subtext: Our team can help you determine if CPMAI is the right fit for your role and goals.

content_blocks.cb_text: Lead AI Projects with Recognized Credentials
content_blocks.cb_subtext: CPMAI training in {city} prepares you to manage artificial intelligence initiatives with a structured, proven framework.

content_blocks.html:
Privacy Policy

Effective Date: June 17, 2026

Granite PM Academy (“we,” “us,” or “our”) operates the website located at granitepmacademy.com. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and protect information when you visit our site or interact with our services.

Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly when you submit an inquiry through our contact form, including your name, email address, phone number (if provided), and the content of your message. We also automatically collect limited technical data when you visit our site, such as your IP address, browser type, and pages visited, through standard web server logs and analytics tools.

How We Use Your Information

We use the information you provide to respond to your inquiries, deliver course information you request, and communicate about programs and services that may be relevant to you. We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties.

Cookies and Analytics

Our website may use cookies or similar tracking technologies to understand how visitors use the site and to improve the user experience. You can configure your browser to refuse cookies, though some features of the site may not function as intended if you do so. We may use a third-party analytics service (such as Google Analytics) that collects anonymized usage data on our behalf.

Third-Party Services

We may use third-party platforms for course registration, payment processing, or email delivery. These providers operate under their own privacy policies and are responsible for their own data handling practices. We choose vendors who maintain appropriate data security standards.

Data Security

We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect the information we collect from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. No method of transmission over the internet is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

Data Retention

We retain contact form submissions and related communications for as long as necessary to respond to your inquiry or fulfill the purpose for which the information was provided. You may contact us to request deletion of your information.

Your Rights

Depending on where you are located, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information, including the right to access, correct, or request deletion of data we hold about you. To exercise these rights, contact us at the address below.

Children’s Privacy

Our website and services are intended for adults. We do not knowingly collect personal information from individuals under 13 years of age.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will post the revised version on this page with an updated effective date. Your continued use of the site after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your information, please contact us at granitepmacademy.com/contact-us.

seo.meta_description: Privacy policy for Granite PM Academy.

content_blocks.html:
Terms and Conditions

Effective Date: June 17, 2026

By accessing or using the Granite PM Academy website at granitepmacademy.com (the “Site”), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Site.

Use of the Site

You may use this Site for lawful purposes only. You agree not to use the Site in any way that violates applicable local, state, national, or international law, or in any manner that could damage, disable, or impair the Site or interfere with other users’ access to it.

Intellectual Property

Confirmed information provided directly by our team at the time of registration supersedes general website content in the event of a discrepancy.

Governing Law
